title: Trade Imports Event Envelope
description: Event envelope for Trade Imports CDP Microservice Architecture

eventId.description: Unique identifier for deduplication, tracing, and replay

subType.description: Discriminator for aggregate sub-types (e.g., IMP, CVEDA)

aggregateId.description: Unique identifier for the aggregate instance (compound key format varies by aggregate type)

aggregateVersion.description: Monotonic version for ordering events within an aggregate instance

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC time the business event occurred (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ milliseconds precision)

data.description: Event-specific payload (structure defined by individual event schemas)

correlationId.description: Correlation identifier propagated from the request boundary

schemaVersion.description: Structural schema version for this event type

schemaUri.description: Reference to the governing event schema definition (e.g., event-submitted-v1.schema.json for live animals submitted, plants-event-submitted-v1.schema.json for plants)
